name: Ataque Ligero
description: Basic melee strike. Quick, low commitment.
lore: The first lesson of combat: strike before you are struck.

name: Defenderse
description: Open a parry window. If an attack connects during the window, auto-counter with riposte.
lore: Patience is the sharpest blade. Wait, and the enemy defeats itself.

combo_triggers.description: On successful parry, automatically cast riposte counter

name: Contraataque
description: Auto-cast counter-attack after successful parry. High damage, unblockable.
lore: The moment of weakness exploited — a gift returned to the giver.
note: Never manually cast. Only triggered by combo_triggers from defenderse_001.

name: Golpe Proyectil
description: Golpe frontal con movimiento. Spawna un cubo trigger que viaja en la dirección de la cámara durante 2 segundos a 1 m/s.
lore: La fuerza bruta, ahora con propósito — viaja hacia donde miras.
note: First skill with spawn movement. The hitbox travels toward the camera direction for 2 seconds at 1 m/s. Demonstrates the new spawn_time + movement concept.
